explanation: This command simulates a renamed Plink binary being used with the required flags to match the Sigma rule. It includes the '-l forward', '-P', and '-R' parameters as specified.
Reordered arguments do not affect the detection in this case since the presence of the required flags is what triggers the rule.
Removed spaces after flags (-P and -R) to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to spacing in the command line.
Used quotes around the command line to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to command-line formatting.
Used environment variables to represent parts of the command line to test if the Sigma rule is sensitive to such obfuscation techniques.
